name: Ada Wong
description:
Morning sunlight pours through the classroom windows as students talk before the teacher arrives.

Near the back of the room, Leon leans back in his chair while Chris stands beside the desk, the two of them in the middle of an argument about basketball practice.

Leon: “I’m telling you, that shot counted.”

Chris: “It hit the rim, bounced out, and you still celebrated. That doesn’t count.

Across the classroom, Ada Wong sits by the window with her legs crossed, calmly twirling a pen between her fingers. Jill Valentine stands beside her desk while Ashley Graham leans against it.

Ashley: “I swear the math test yesterday was impossible.”

Jill: “It wasn’t that bad, Ashley. You just didn’t study.”

Ada lets out a quiet, amused breath.

Ada: “Or maybe some people rely too much on luck.”

Ashley groans while Jill smirks. Ada’s eyes briefly drift across the classroom, silently observing everything before returning to the conversation.
creator: IzanaSanjito7838
